title: Sith Civil War
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the aftermath of the [[Jedi Civil War]]|the [[Sith civil war]] during the [[Republic Dark Age]]}} {{Otheruses|Civil war}} {{War |prev=[[Jedi Civil War]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' |conc=*[[Dark Wars]] *[[First Jedi Purge]]''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' *Kanz Disorders {{C|early years}} |next=[[Kanz Disorders/Legends|Kanz Disorders]] |image= |name=Sith Civil War |begin=[[3956 BBY]] |end=[[3950 BBY]] |date= |place=[[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], throughout the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] |result=*Disintegration of the Sith Empire and absorption of its remnants into the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] *Destruction of the [[Sith Triumvirate]] |battles= |side1=[[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]] of [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire]] |side2=Sith Lords of the [[Sith Triumvirate]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=Various Sith warlords |commanders2=[[Kreia|Darth Traya]]†
[[Darth Nihilus]]†
[[Darth Sion]]† |commanders3= |commanders4= }} {{Quote|There are many factions within the Sith, each attempting to take what little remains from the Jedi Civil War.|[[Visas Marr]]|}} The '''Sith Civil War''' was a conflict that wracked the remains of the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] in the wake of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. Following the death of [[Darth Malak]] during the [[Battle of Rakata Prime]], several of the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]] who had followed [[Revan/Legends|Darth Revan]] and Malak during the war attempted to take what scraps they could from the ruins of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] Empire. Declaring themselves sovereign warlords, they fractured the Empire into a number of small, hotly-contested kingdoms. During the height of the Sith Civil War, many of the Sith warlords united under the [[Sith Triumvirate]] of [[Kreia|Darth Traya]], [[Darth Sion]], and [[Darth Nihilus]], but upon their deaths, the Civil War escalated once more. By [[3950 BBY]], the remnants of the Sith Empire disintegrated entirely due to the constant infighting. As a result, the Galactic Republic was able to conquer Sith space, and reclaim worlds that had been under Sith control since the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. ==History== {{Quote|I was there when the Academy on Korriban fell… and the Sith turned on one another, like beasts. Our chance of an empire… destroyed by Revan.|[[Darth Sion]]|}} Following Revan's [[Skirmish on Korriban|attack]] on the [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]] during his search for the [[Star Forge]], and the death of Darth Malak during the conclusion of the Jedi Civil War, the remaining Sith Lords battled amongst themselves as each sought to rule the remnants of the Sith Empire. The bloody [[civil war]] began on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], centered around the Sith Academy there. As a result of the chaos, the [[Dreshdae]] settlement on Korriban was abandoned by [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]]. At the height of the civil war on Korriban, Revan led a host of Jedi in an invasion of the Sith homeworld, and his forces successfully drove the Sith Lords from the planet.''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' When Republic forces [[Expedition to Korriban|arrived]] on Korriban approximately a year after the Jedi Civil War's conclusion, they found the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] to be barren and lifeless. After fleeing Korriban, the Sith survivors scattered across the breadth of the Sith space and the Sith Empire began to fracture in earnest. In the year [[3955 BBY]], the surviving Sith Lords tore the empire apart as they battled for supremacy, and the empire was eventually divided up between the most powerful of the feuding warlords. In the year [[3954 BBY]], the [[Sith Triumvirate]], which consisted of [[Kreia|Darth Traya]], [[Darth Nihilus]], and [[Darth Sion]] emerged as the heirs apparent of the Sith Empire. In time, they united most of the remaining Sith Lords beneath their banner. Following the deaths of the Sith Triumvirate on [[Malachor V]], the destruction of the [[Trayus Academy]], and the foiling of their plot to exterminate the Jedi and destabilize the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the leaderless Sith descended into anarchy once again. They turned upon each other and eventually destroyed what little remained of their Empire. However, records indicate that at least one Sith Lord bearing the title of "[[Darth/Legends|Darth]]" survived, if for nothing else but to train a [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]]. ==Legacy== Because the Sith Civil War served as the ''final'' destruction of Revan's Sith Empire, it provided yet another reason for [[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]] to have established his [[Rule of Two/Legends|Rule of Two]] many millennia later. With only two Sith in the galaxy at any one time, it would prevent a disaster such as the Sith Civil War from ever happening again. ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|Whoever survives this Sith Civil War shall not be one I wish to follow. There is only Revan. Only he can shape this galaxy as it is meant to be shaped.|Bastila Shan, if the male dark side–aligned Revan is chosen|}} The Sith Civil War first appeared in the [[2004]] [[Obsidian Entertainment]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]], ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''. The title of the conflict would only be stated by [[Bastila Shan]] if the player chooses Revan to be dark side–aligned in that game. ==Appearances== *''[[The Old Republic: Revan]]'' {{Ab|The Old Republic: Revan (audiobook)}} {{Mo}} *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Path of Destruction (audiobook)}} {{Mo}} *[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']] {{Ab|Darth Plagueis (audiobook)}} {{Imo}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide]]'' *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] *''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{InsiderCite|114|Class Wars!}} *''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide: Updated and Expanded]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{OldSithWarsNav}} {{History Sith}} {{Interlang |de=Sith-Bürgerkrieg#legends |el=Εμφύλιος Πόλεμος των Σιθ |es=Guerra Civil Sith |fi=Sithien sisällissota |fr=Guerre Civile des Sith |tr=Sith İç Savaşı }} [[Category:Civil wars]] [[Category:Conflicts of the Dark Wars]] [[Category:Conflicts of the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Dark Wars]]
